meaning: adj.不光明正大的,没有运动家风格的
examples: White Diagonal: once only warning for unsportsmanlike behavior.
A yellow card system will be used to monitor unsportsmanlike behavior, rough play and improper conduct.
The unsportsmanlike noises of the fans so unnerved our star player that he missed two foul shots in a row.
Suarez did not speak after the game but issued an apology Sunday for his unsportsmanlike conduct.
The Devils had been assessed a pair of unsportsmanlike penalties when the game was still up for grabs.
